title: justicia chol
intro: Justicia chol, also known as "Mexican Feather Grass" or "Mexican Justicia," is a perennial plant native to Mexico and Central America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Justicia chol include reducing fever, relieving coughs and colds, and improving respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Justicia chol include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including bronchitis, pneumonia, and other respiratory issues.
